title: anthemis tinctoria var. australis
intro: Anthemis tinctoria var. australis, also known as yellow chamomile or Australian chamomile, is a variety of the chamomile plant that is native to Australia and has a similar appearance to the common chamomile. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and swelling. The health benefits of Anthemis tinctoria var. australis include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, used topically in the form of a cream or ointment, or added to baths for a calming and relaxing soak.
